verified.notes: Age 65+ is explicitly protected from recent Medicaid changes per Minnesota DHS. Asset limits are from 2026 long-term care/waiver pathway for seniors. Income limits vary by household composition and category (seniors, disabled, etc.) and are not provided as single values in retrieved sources. Official phone number for MA applications not found in search results; contact through MNsure or local DHS office. Program remains active as of April 2026 but subject to federal changes effective fall 2026 and beyond.

Income limits vary by household composition and category (seniors, disabled, etc.) and are not provided as single values in retrieved sources. Official phone number for MA applications not found in search results; contact through MNsure or local DHS office. Program remains active as of April 2026 but subject to federal changes effective fall 2026 and beyond.
